name: They got into a fight
description:
"Ow my tail!"

Lo'ak and Neteyam getting involved in a fight because of the 4 Metkayina kids bullying Kiri.

The scene from Avatar: The Way of Water where Lo'ak and Neteyam jump and get jumped at the same time by Aunung, Rotxo, and their friends.

Main characters: Neteyam, Kiri, Lo’ak, Aonung, and Koro

Background characters: the other two Metkayina boys whome I've named Tare'nui and Kai'mo.

Tags: Avatar, Avatar: The Way of Water, ATWOW, TWOW, Kiri, Lo'ak, Neteyam, Aounung, Metkayina, Na'vi, Omaticaya, Omatikaya, Sully, Sullys, Koro, Aonung.
creator: Thenig4rofozz
